agent.userMessage: How is my portfolio doing this week?

pricing.title: The right plan for you
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade as you grow.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Which market data providers does Openbulls support?
faq.a1: KAP, TCMB, Yahoo Finance, Twelve Data and SEC integrations are live. Bloomberg and Reuters integrations are coming.
faq.q2: How do the AI agents work?
faq.a2: A multi-agent system running on LangGraph: financial statements, technical indicators and news flow are analyzed by separate agents, then results are synthesized.
faq.q3: How does the credit system work?
faq.a3: Each AI query consumes credits based on token usage. Credits reset monthly, and you can see your live balance from the dashboard.
faq.a4: All data is protected by row-level security (RLS) in Postgres. Better Auth sessions are carried via encrypted cookies. We are building on SOC2-compliant infrastructure.
faq.q5: What does the Free plan include?
faq.a5: The Free plan includes 100 credits per month, 1 portfolio and basic AI analysis. You can upgrade to Pro when you hit your limit.
faq.a6: Yes — cancel from the dashboard at any time. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.
